inputs.label: Bitcoin Amount
inputs.businessContext: Enter the amount of Bitcoin to convert to USD. Set to 0 if converting USD to BTC.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the amount of Bitcoin to convert to USD. Set to 0 if converting USD to BTC.
businessContext_i18n.tr: USD'ye dönüştürmek için Bitcoin miktarını girin. USD'den BTC'ye dönüştürüyorsanız 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den Bitcoin-Betrag ein, der in USD umgerechnet werden soll. Auf 0 setzen, wenn USD in BTC umgerechnet wird.

inputs.label: USD Amount
inputs.businessContext: Enter the amount of USD to convert to Bitcoin. Set to 0 if converting BTC to USD.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the amount of USD to convert to Bitcoin. Set to 0 if converting BTC to USD.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitcoin'e dönüştürülecek USD miktarını girin. BTC'den USD'ye dönüştürüyorsanız 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den USD-Betrag ein, der in Bitcoin umgewandelt werden soll. Auf 0 setzen, wenn BTC in USD umgerechnet wird.

inputs.label: BTC Market Price
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of 1 Bitcoin in USD.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price of 1 Bitcoin in USD.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 Bitcoin'in USD cinsinden güncel piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Marktpreis von 1 Bitcoin in USD.

inputs.label: Transaction Fee (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage fee charged per transaction (e.g., 0.5 for 0.5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage fee charged per transaction (e.g., 0.5 for 0.5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem başına alınan yüzde ücret (örneğin, %0,5 için 0,5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Gebühr pro Transaktion (z. B. 0,5 für 0,5 %).

inputs.label: Fixed Fee (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee in USD added per transaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed fee in USD added per transaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem başına eklenen USD cinsinden sabit ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Gebühr in USD, die pro Transaktion hinzugefügt wird.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
